code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8085';function StudentManager(){const[students,setStudents]=useState([]);const[name,setName]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{axios.get(`${API_URL}/students`).then(res=>setStudents(res.data));},[]);const addStudent=()=>{axios.post(`${API_URL}/students`,{name}).then(()=>{axios.get(`${API_URL}/students`).then(res=>setStudents(res.data));setName('');});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{value:name,onChange:e=>setName(e.target.value),placeholder:"Student Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:addStudent,children:"Add Student"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:students.map(s=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{children:s.name},s.id))})]});}export default StudentManager;
